requirement_topic.en: Armenia Market Access — SARM, EAEU / EAC, PSRC / ENA, and Early-Stage EV Demand
requirement_topic.zh: 亚美尼亚市场准入——SARM、EAEU / EAC、PSRC / ENA及早期EV需求
requirement_topic.zht: 亞美尼亞市場准入——SARM、EAEU / EAC、PSRC / ENA及早期EV需求

summary.en: Armenia's EV charging market is early-stage but growing, supported by used-EV imports, urban demand around Yerevan, and gradual charging-network development. Market access is not just a sales question: SARM standards adoption, EAEU Technical Regulations and EAC marking for in-scope products, customs documentation, PSRC electricity-sector oversight, ENA interconnection conditions, site-owner acceptance, and installer competence can all become gates. The most important compliance point is that Armenia is an EAEU member, so EAEU TR CU / EAC genuinely applies to in-scope EV charging equipment.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚电动汽车充电市场仍处早期但正在增长，受到二手电动汽车进口、埃里温周边城市需求和充电网络逐步发展的推动。市场准入不仅是销售问题：SARM标准采纳、范围内产品的EAEU技术法规及EAC标志、海关文件、PSRC电力行业监管、ENA接入条件、场地方验收和安装方能力都可能成为门槛。最重要的合规点是，亚美尼亚是EAEU成员国，因此EAEU TR CU / EAC确实适用于范围内电动汽车充电设备。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞電動汽車充電市場仍處早期但正在增長，受到二手電動汽車進口、埃里溫周邊城市需求和充電網絡逐步發展的推動。市場准入不僅是銷售問題：SARM標準採納、範圍內產品的EAEU技術法規及EAC標誌、海關文件、PSRC電力行業監管、ENA接入條件、場地方驗收和安裝方能力都可能成為門檻。最重要的合規點是，亞美尼亞是EAEU成員國，因此EAEU TR CU / EAC確實適用於範圍內電動汽車充電設備。

standards_or_laws: SARM — Armenia national standards and metrology body
EAEU TR CU 004/2011 — low-voltage equipment safety
EAC marking for in-scope EAEU products
PSRC and ENA electricity-sector coordination for charger installations

summary.en: China's EV charging market is mature and governed by GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930 communication, domestic grid-operator acceptance, and China-specific product conformity routes. Those documents can support technical due diligence, but they do not create Armenia market access, do not replace EAC conformity for in-scope products, and do not solve IEC connector or local grid-connection requirements.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电市场成熟，由GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、GB/T 27930通信、国内电网运营商验收和中国专属产品合格评定路径管理。这些文件可支持技术尽调，但不能形成亚美尼亚市场准入，不能替代范围内产品的EAC合格评定，也不能解决IEC接口或当地并网要求。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電市場成熟，由GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、GB/T 27930通訊、國內電網運營商驗收和中國專屬產品合格評定路徑管理。這些文件可支持技術盡調，但不能形成亞美尼亞市場准入，不能替代範圍內產品的EAC合格評定，也不能解決IEC接口或當地併網要求。

standards_or_laws: China domestic grid and product-conformity routes

gap.en: The export plan should allocate lead time for EAEU TR CU / EAC scope determination, EAC certification or declaration where required, SARM standards check, IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 evidence, EMC reports for TR CU 020/2011 and IEC 61000, PSRC / ENA coordination, Armenian importer documentation, labels and manuals, and site commissioning. Armenia's early EV market may be commercially attractive, but it does not reduce the conformity burden.
gap.zh: 出口计划应为EAEU TR CU / EAC适用范围判断、要求时的EAC认证或声明、SARM标准核查、IEC 61851和IEC 62196证据、TR CU 020/2011及IEC 61000 EMC报告、PSRC / ENA协调、亚美尼亚进口商文件、标签和说明书，以及现场调试预留时间。亚美尼亚早期EV市场可能具有商业吸引力，但不会降低合规负担。
gap.zht: 出口計畫應為EAEU TR CU / EAC適用範圍判斷、要求時的EAC認證或聲明、SARM標準核查、IEC 61851和IEC 62196證據、TR CU 020/2011及IEC 61000 EMC報告、PSRC / ENA協調、亞美尼亞進口商文件、標籤和說明書，以及現場調試預留時間。亞美尼亞早期EV市場可能具有商業吸引力，但不會降低合規負擔。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where EAEU TR CU / EAC applies to in-scope products; PSRC / ENA and site-owner requirements apply to grid-connected installations; market demand context is informational only
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic compliance is not accepted as Armenia market access or EAEU EAC conformity

source.publisher: Public Services Regulatory Commission of the Republic of Armenia (PSRC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Armenia's EV market is nascent but real; the compliance route should still be treated as formal. Because Armenia is an EAEU member, EAEU TR CU / EAC is a genuine pathway for in-scope chargers, alongside SARM standards checks and PSRC / ENA coordination.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 亚美尼亚EV市场处于早期但具有实际需求；合规路径仍应按正式流程处理。由于亚美尼亚是EAEU成员国，EAEU TR CU / EAC对范围内充电桩是真实路径，并需同时核查SARM标准及协调PSRC / ENA。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞美尼亞EV市場處於早期但具有實際需求；合規路徑仍應按正式流程處理。由於亞美尼亞是EAEU成員國，EAEU TR CU / EAC對範圍內充電樁是真實路徑，並需同時核查SARM標準及協調PSRC / ENA。
